utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2) travel_dates → present and specific ('2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05').

6) additional_services → includes dining details, restaurant name, cuisine, average price, child-friendly, total cost, currency → fully specified.
7) total_budget → includes total price, currency, and detailed cost breakdown → fully specified.
All 7 required items are present and fully detailed.
